== Notes for [[Item:Q103106|Q103106]] ==


Shemaiah ,

son of Shlomo and nn to: nn

1) David to: nn

--------------------
source: http://www.geni.com/people/Shemaya-ben-Shlomo/6000000000795569798?through=6000000000795550634

Shemaiah ,

son of Shlomo and nn to: nn

1) David to: nn

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000000795569798

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
